text.title: threads-basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for threads-basics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Cross-posting X/Twitter threads verbatim to Threads.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Twitter irony, link references, and thread formatting do not translate. Threads rewards warmth and conversational register; verbatim X content reads as out-of-place and suppresses engagement. Force a register-shift rewrite step.

failure-mode.description: Agent auto-posts to Threads on a schedule.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: No stable scheduling API exists as of 2026. Meta is aggressive about automation detection. Best practice: agent drafts and ranks 20 candidates, operator picks 7-10 and posts manually within prime windows.

failure-mode.description: Agent uses identical hook phrases across drafts ("Hot take:", "Honest question:").
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hook repetition reduces engagement. Enforce banned-bigram lists in the prompt to force variety across a content pack.

failure-mode.description: Agent includes engagement-bait phrases: "comment X for Y", "tag a friend", "follow for more".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: These phrases are flagged by Meta and suppress reach. Explicitly prohibit them in every prompt.
